hypotheses.text: Group B teams concede more goals in the 65-80 minute window under mandatory breaks (Era C)
hypotheses.formal: β₃ > 0 in Y_ijt = α + β₁·GroupB + β₂·BreakWindow + β₃·GroupB × BreakWindow × EraC + Σγ·controls + ε

hypotheses.text: Group B teams face higher hazard of conceding immediately after breaks
hypotheses.formal: HR(GroupB vs GroupA | post-break) > 1 in Cox PH model with stratified baselines

hypotheses.text: In-play odds movements correlate with match-model residuals in break windows
hypotheses.formal: corr(residual_ij, Δodds_ij|break) > 0, tested via two-stage residual regression

hypotheses.text: Win probability swings in the 65→80 window are larger for Group B-leading matches
